release_notes.de:
Version 0.3.7.1 - TipTap Feature-Komplettierung.
- 🖼 Neu: Bild-Upload in TipTap.
- 📊 Neu: Tabellen-Unterstützung in TipTap.
- 🔗 Neu: Links, Zitate, Tasklisten und Code-Blöcke in der TipTap Toolbar.
release_notes.en:
Version 0.3.7.1 - TipTap Feature Completion.
- 🖼 New: Image upload support in TipTap.
- 📊 New: Table support in TipTap.
- 🔗 New: Links, quotes, task lists, and code blocks in TipTap toolbar.
